instruction: Walk straight out of the bathroom, with the sink on your left, and enter the hallway. Continue straight through the hallway, passing a bedroom on your right. Turn left to enter the living room. Walk forward through the living room, passing the television on your right and a couch on your left. Proceed to the end of the living room and turn left into the dining area. Walk past the dining table on your right and stop in front of the kitchen counter with the stove on your left.
